paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.
Recent news includes a headline from simplywall.st regarding the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and a $375M convertibles deal.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K form on July 15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and an 8-K form on July 13 regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
